vocab.example: I don't just see a watch as a tool; to me, a high-end Rolex is a true horological masterpiece.

vocab.meaning: lỗi thời, không còn được sử dụng
vocab.example: Many people argue that traditional wristwatches have become obsolete since everyone carries a smartphone.
I wear this vintage Omega every day because it’s a family heirloom passed down from my grandfather.

vocab.meaning: một tuyên ngôn thời trang (khẳng định phong cách)
vocab.example: For me, wearing a watch is less about telling time and more about making a bold fashion statement.

vocab.meaning: giá trị về mặt tình cảm
vocab.example: This watch was a graduation gift, so it holds immense sentimental value regardless of its actual price.
I’m fascinated by the intricate mechanism inside mechanical watches that functions without any battery.

vocab.meaning: tôn lên bộ trang phục của tôi
vocab.example: I always choose a leather-strap watch to complement my attire when attending formal business meetings.
A smartwatch is a highly functional accessory that helps me track my fitness goals and notifications.
Wearing a watch keeps me mindful of the time and helps me maintain my reputation for punctuality.
I don't think it's necessary to spend an extravagant amount of money on a diamond-encrusted watch.
